name: wool_saga_nodes
description: Four Wool Crush saga-map node states sharing one thick spool-button geometry. CURRENT: a bright turquoise yarn spool with a warm golden rim and soft glow. UPCOMING: a cream yarn spool with a muted tan rim. LOCKED: the cream spool tightly tied across its middle by a simple raspberry yarn knot. COMPLETE: the cream spool with a bold golden stitched check mark on its center.
prompt_extra: strict 2 by 2 sheet; identical squat spool silhouette, size, center face and lighting in all cells; center stays open enough for level numbers except the explicit lock knot/check state; no letters, crowns, chains or unrelated symbols

variants.name: spool
variants.prompt_extra: classic wooden spool ends wrapped with soft yarn

variants.name: cushion
variants.prompt_extra: softer rounded spool-button with simpler yarn bands
